data.title: Test gate error message: 'Re-run record-test-status.sh' missing full path and --source-file flag
data.description: The pre-commit test gate outputs 'Re-run record-test-status.sh or use /dso:commit to re-record test status' when the diff hash changed. But the script is at plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh (not scripts/) and requires --source-file flag. Agents seeing this message run 'bash plugins/dso/scripts/record-test-status.sh ...' (wrong path) and get a 127 error before finding the correct path. Suggestion: include the full invocation in the error message: 'bash plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh --source-file <changed-source-file>'.
